generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure is making us vulnerable? Just last year, a major power grid failure in Europe was traced back to a backdoor in imported control systems. We can't afford to wait for another crisis. It's time to invest in homegrown solutions and secure our strategic autonomy. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
